data.name: severity.info
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity label for informational lease status. Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.warning
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity label for warnings on lease expiry, renewal-due, or rent-mismatch. Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.error
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity label for blocking failures (lease persistence, lookup failure). Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.critical
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity label for critical lease incidents (legal-deadline miss, signed-document loss). Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: action.save
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Action verb on the submit/commit button for lease forms. Imperative; sentence case. Block-scoped pilot string for cascade verification.

data.name: action.cancel
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Action verb on dismiss/abort buttons in lease dialogs. Imperative; sentence case.

data.name: action.retry
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Action verb on retry button after a failed lease save or fetch. Imperative; sentence case.

data.name: state.loading
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Empty-state placeholder shown while leases are being fetched. Trailing horizontal ellipsis (U+2026).
